# Chấn Nguyễn — Kongou Dev

Frontend & Mobile Engineer based in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam. 3+ years of experience building fintech, Web3, and Solana-powered products. TOKEN 2049 Hackathon 1st Place winner (Polkadot Track, Singapore).

## Expertise

- **Frontend**: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn
- **Mobile**: React Native, Expo, iOS/Android
- **Backend**: NestJS, Express.js, GraphQL, Apollo Server
- **Blockchain**: Solana Web3.js, Ethers.js, WalletConnect, DeFi, NFT
- **Database**: PostgreSQL, MongoDB

## Selected Projects

- [Whampays](https://channguyen.io.vn/#work) — Solana payment app with fiat/crypto transfers, Apple Pay, QR. Built with React Native.
- [Moonrush](https://channguyen.io.vn/#work) — Solana decentralized trading with on/off-ramp and real-time market data.
- [Llamaoism](https://channguyen.io.vn/#work) — NFT minting on Monad Testnet with WalletConnect integration.
- [EncryptSim](https://channguyen.io.vn/#work) — Secure eSIM app with wallet authentication and VPN.

## Work Experience

- **Whammy Tech** (Mar 2025 – Present) — Frontend Developer
- **Llamao** (Mar 2025 – Sep 2025) — Frontend Developer (Part-time)
- **Orochi Network** (Feb 2024 – Jan 2025) — Frontend Developer
- **HD Websoft** (Nov 2023 – Apr 2024) — Software Developer
